name: controlagro-mobile
description: Base do app mobile offline-first do ControlAGRO.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run config:default && npm run build && npx cap sync && npm run native:default
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync:dev: npm run config:dev && npm run build:dev && npx cap sync && npm run native:dev
scripts.cap:sync:homolog: npm run config:homolog && npm run build:homolog && npx cap sync && npm run native:homolog
scripts.cap:sync:prod: npm run config:prod && npm run build:prod && npx cap sync && npm run native:prod
